summary: Invalid positionals now exit 2: Spotify-ID shape validation on the deprecated-endpoint stubs and tracks-where; play-on returns typed exit 2 when the device cannot be resolved or is offline; fixed the related-artists Example to use the canonical subcommand name.
reason: Live dogfood's error-path probe passes a malformed positional and requires a non-zero exit. The stubs returned their deprecation payload with exit 0 for any argument, tracks-where returned an empty result envelope, and play-on printed the available-device list but reported success for a playback that never started.
validated_outcome: All five commands exit 2 on __printing_press_invalid__; valid IDs unaffected; go test ./internal/cli passes.
